articles.title: Charles Hoskinson says Cardano is ready to “take over the world”
articles.description: TL;DR Charles Hoskinson is working to achieve a “decentralized revolution” with the implementation of the Chang Hard Fork and key governance improvements. Community participation: the introduction of Delegate Representatives (DReps) facilitates decision-making without sacrificing efficiency. articles.title: Justin Sun Dumping Ethereum: Will ETH Price Action Slow Dow?
articles.description: Tron founder Justin Sun has initiated the withdrawal of 52,905 Ethereum (ETH) from Lido Finance. It amounts to a substantial $209 million. articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Bullish Momentum Under Pressure as $1 Hangs By a Thread
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) faces the risk of slipping below the critical $1 mark after days of volatile, see-saw price action. Since the weekend, the altcoin has struggled to stabilize, hovering around the same price region. articles.title: Bitcoin Hits New Record High at $106K
articles.description: Bitcoin surges to a new all-time high of $106K, driven by strong institutional support and favorable economic signals from the Federal Reserve.

articles.title: MicroStrategy Hints at New Bitcoin Buy After Nasdaq Milestone
articles.description: Michael Saylor hints at a new Bitcoin purchase as MicroStrategy joins Nasdaq-100, while Marathon Digital aims for its own index breakthrough.

articles.title: MicroStrategy’s Saylor hints at first Bitcoin purchase above $100K
articles.description: MicroStrategy’s Michael Saylor has posted the same Bitcoin chart for five consecutive Sundays, and every time, MicroStrategy confirmed a new Bitcoin purchase the following day.
